form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently 2nd of 8 at Wyong Bm78 on March 18 over 2125m, slow going head behind Subarctic with 56kg at $5. The race before that ran on strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 10 at Warwick Farm Bm78 on March 11 over 1600m, slow going 2.75 len behind Fiddlers Green carrying 56kg at $19. Close to a victory and the claim helps his cause.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming came home strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 7 at Sandown-Hillside Cg&E Bm74 on February 25 over 1400m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Test Of Love with 54kg at $17. Second-up got back early 7th of 11 at Randwick Kensington Bm78 on March 25 over 1800m, slow going 7 len behind Glad You Think So carrying 52kg at $7.50. Fitter now and will relish the extra trip in this easier contest.
